title: Parmesan Garlic Mashed Potatoes
ingredients: 2 pounds golden potatoes, peeled and cut into medium-large cubes
½ cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese
Salt and white pepper to taste
Optional: truffle or porcini mushroom oil
instructions: Boil potatoes with garlic and salt until tender.
Drain well and return to pan.
Heat on low until all water is evaporated.
Mash potatoes well (may also use a potato ricer).
Add salt and pepper to taste.
notes: May use a potato ricer instead of mashing by hand
Optional drizzle of truffle or porcini mushroom oil for extra flavor
